mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room ORDER BY room_number
SELECT * FROM room WHERE status = 'available' ORDER BY room_number
SELECT * FROM room WHERE floor = #{floor} ORDER BY room_number
SELECT * FROM room WHERE room_type = #{roomType} ORDER BY room_number
SELECT * FROM room WHERE floor = #{floor} AND room_type = #{roomType} ORDER BY room_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (room_number, room_type, floor, status, price) VALUES (#{roomNumber}, #{roomType}, #{floor}, #{status}, #{price})
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET room_number=#{roomNumber}, room_type=#{roomType}, floor=#{floor}, status=#{status}, price=#{price} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE room SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
